Senior Software Engineer

TechFlow Systems San Francisco, CA (Hybrid)
Full-time 5+ years experience $160,000 - $210,000/year Posted 3 days ago

About the Role

TechFlow Systems is looking for a Senior Software Engineer to join our Platform team. You will design and build the backend services that power our real-time data processing pipeline, serving millions of API requests per day. This is a hybrid role based in our San Francisco office, with 3 days on-site per week.

Responsibilities

  • Design, develop, and maintain scalable backend services using Node.js and TypeScript
  • Build and optimize GraphQL APIs consumed by our React-based frontend
  • Architect and manage PostgreSQL databases, including schema design and query optimization
  • Deploy and manage containerized services on AWS using Docker and ECS
  • Implement and maintain CI/CD pipelines for automated testing and deployment
  • Collaborate with product and design teams to translate requirements into technical solutions
  • Mentor junior engineers and participate in code reviews

Requirements

  • 5+ years of professional software development experience
  • Strong proficiency in TypeScript and Node.js
  • Experience building production React applications
  • Solid understanding of relational databases, particularly PostgreSQL
  • Hands-on experience with AWS services (EC2, ECS, S3, RDS, Lambda)
  • Experience with Docker and container orchestration
  • Familiarity with GraphQL API design and implementation
  • Experience with CI/CD tools such as GitHub Actions, Jenkins, or CircleCI

Nice to Have

  • Experience with event-driven architectures (Kafka, SQS)
  • Familiarity with infrastructure-as-code tools (Terraform, CDK)
  • Contributions to open source projects

Benefits

  • Competitive salary and equity package
  • Health, dental, and vision insurance
  • 401(k) with company match
  • Flexible PTO policy
  • Annual learning and development stipend
